tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ls -l /usr/bin/python3.12 /usr/bin/python3; pytthon3.12 -V; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null httpp://1.1.1.1; echo $?
